settings.heading: Print Process
settings.text: Collector-grade standards from source curation to final dispatch.

settings.heading: From Curation To Packaging
settings.intro: Every edition follows a controlled process designed for visual impact and long-term display confidence.

settings.heading: Source Selection
settings.text: Visual references are selected for tone, texture, and narrative pressure.

settings.heading: Color Calibration
settings.text: Digital and physical output are matched to preserve contrast and shadow detail.

settings.heading: Collector Packaging
settings.text: Finished works are sealed and reinforced for safe transit and clean arrival.

settings.heading: Collector-Grade Execution
settings.text: Every format is chosen for clarity, depth, and display longevity.
